welcome.title: Welcome to RL Stats
welcome.description: Your personal performance terminal for Rocket League. Analyze your matches in real time and discover patterns in your gameplay.

connection.title: Local Connection
connection.description: The app connects directly to the Rocket League data stream on your PC via a local TCP connection on port <port>49123</port>.
connection.bullet1: Rocket League sends real-time events through port 49123.
connection.bullet2: The app listens for these events and processes them locally.
connection.bullet3: All data is stored only on your PC — nothing goes to the internet.

identity.title: Who are you in-game?
identity.description: We need your exact Rocket League name to identify you once and then set your PrimaryId automatically.
identity.hint: If you change your nickname later, you can update it from Settings.
identity.error: Enter your exact in-game Rocket League name.

findGame.title: Find Rocket League
findGame.description: We look for your Rocket League installation to automatically configure the stats API.
findGame.autoDetectError: Installation not detected automatically. Try searching manually.
findGame.manualHint: To configure manually, make sure Rocket League is installed and run the app as administrator.

liveDashboard.title: Live Dashboard
liveDashboard.desc: Monitor every match in real time.

matchHistory.title: Match History
matchHistory.desc: Access your past results and stats.

analytics.title: Performance Analytics
analytics.desc: Visualize trends and patterns in your gameplay.

complete.title: All set!
complete.description: Now open Rocket League and the app will start detecting your matches automatically.
